hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: Social IQ Mixpanel — simulator events have $model = arm64. Add a string filter on $model does-not-equal arm64 to insights/funnels/retention queries unless the user explicitly wants simulator data."}}'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.swift ]]; then ISSUES=""; if grep -qE "foregroundColor\(|NavigationView|ObservableObject|@Published|cornerRadius\(|DispatchQueue\.main|Timer\.publish" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}BANNED API detected. "; fi; if grep -qE "RoundedRectangle.*fill.*Color\.white\.opacity\(0\.08\)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q "func cardBackground" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}INLINE STYLE: use .cardBackground() instead of inline RoundedRectangle.fill(Color.white.opacity(0.08)). "; fi; if grep -qE "LinearGradient.*Theme\.gold.*Theme\.goldLight|LinearGradient.*goldLight.*gold" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q "goldGradient" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}INLINE STYLE: use Theme.goldGradient instead of inline LinearGradient. "; fi; if grep -qE "UIImpactFeedbackGenerator|UINotificationFeedbackGenerator" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q "Utilities/" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}INLINE HAPTIC: use HapticService instead of raw UIKit feedback generators. "; fi; if [[ -n "$ISSUES" ]]; then echo "$ISSUES Check CLAUDE.md shared UI patterns."; fi; fi'
